scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @talim/types build && doppler run -- turbo run dev
scripts.dev:admin: pnpm --filter @talim/types build && doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/admin dev
scripts.dev:all: pnpm dev:infra && pnpm db:migrate:deploy && pnpm dev
scripts.db:generate: doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/api exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/api exec prisma db push
scripts.db:studio: doppler run -- pnpm --filter @talim/api exec prisma studio
scripts.doppler:upload: doppler secrets upload env.template --project talim-ai --config dev
